overview.description: The SP Funds Dow Jones Global Sukuk ETF (SPSK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of USD-denominated global investment-grade sukuk of various maturities and weighted by market value. SPSK was launched on Dec 30, 2019 and is issued by SP Funds.
infoTable: Dow Jones Sukuk Total Return (No Coupon Reinvestment)
